name: Skarn
backstory: A raider who leads a loose pack through the periphery, taking water and goods at spearpoint. He holds the desert's oldest law in contempt of mercy: the strong eat, the weak feed them. Violent, direct, and openly contemptuous of weakness.

core_values: Mercy is a debt you cannot afford out here
moral_boundaries: I will not torture — a clean death is cheaper than a slow one
I will not break a deal I have taken payment for — my word is the only thing that scales
soul.personality: Violent, direct, contemptuous of anything he reads as weakness.
goals: Rule the periphery by force and take the Siphon for my pack
